intro: Control your SwitchBot devices from the menu bar with a single tap. Start by setting up API credentials.

issue.title: Issue in the app
issue.body: SwitchBot app → Profile → Preferences → Developer Options

paste.title: Paste and connect
paste.body: Paste them into the form below and "Save and connect".

storageNote: The values you enter are kept in your OS secure storage (Keychain / Credential Manager / Secret Service) and are never shown in plain text on screen or in logs.
